{% capture tocWorkspace %} {% comment %} Version 1.0.8 https://github.com/allejo/jekyll-toc "...like all things liquid - where there's a will, and ~36 hours to spare, there's usually a/some way" ~jaybe Usage: {% include toc.html html=content sanitize=true class="inline_toc" id="my_toc" h_min=2 h_max=3 %} Parameters: * html (string) - the HTML of compiled markdown generated by kramdown in Jekyll Optional Parameters: * sanitize (bool) : false - when set to true, the headers will be stripped of any HTML in the TOC * class (string) : '' - a CSS class assigned to the TOC * id (string) : '' - an ID to assigned to the TOC * h_min (int) : 1 - the minimum TOC header level to use; any header lower than this value will be ignored * h_max (int) : 6 - the maximum TOC header level to use; any header greater than this value will be ignored * ordered (bool) : false - when set to true, an ordered list will be outputted instead of an unordered list * item_class (string) : '' - add custom class(es) for each list item; has support for '%level%' placeholder, which is the current heading level * baseurl (string) : '' - add a base url to the TOC links for when your TOC is on another page than the actual content * anchor_class (string) : '' - add custom class(es) for each anchor element * skipNoIDs (bool) : false - skip headers that do not have an `id` attribute Output: An ordered or unordered list representing the table of contents of a markdown block. This snippet will only generate the table of contents and will NOT output the markdown given to it {% endcomment %} {% capture my_toc %}{% endcapture %} {% assign orderedList = include.ordered | default: false %} {% assign skipNoIDs = include.skipNoIDs | default: false %} {% assign minHeader = include.h_min | default: 1 %} {% assign maxHeader = include.h_max | default: 6 %} {% assign nodes = include.html | split: ' maxHeader %} {% continue %} {% endif %} {% if firstHeader %} {% assign firstHeader = false %} {% assign minHeader = headerLevel %} {% endif %} {% assign indentAmount = headerLevel | minus: minHeader %} {% assign _workspace = node | split: '' | first }}>{% endcapture %} {% assign header = _workspace[0] | replace: _hAttrToStrip, '' %} {% assign space = '' %} {% for i in (1..indentAmount) %} {% assign space = space | prepend: ' ' %} {% endfor %} {% unless include.item_class == blank %} {% capture listItemClass %} class="{{ include.item_class | replace: '%level%', headerLevel }}"{% endcapture %} {% endunless %} {% capture anchor_body %}{% if include.sanitize %}{{ header | strip_html }}{% else %}{{ header }}{% endif %}{% endcapture %} {% capture anchor_body %}{{ anchor_body | replace: "|", "\|" }}{% endcapture %} {% if html_id %} {% comment %} 确定是否需要打开新的嵌套列表 {% endcomment %} {% assign currentLevel = headerLevel | minus: minHeader %} {% if currentLevel > lastLevel %} {% comment %} 需要打开一个或多个子列表 {% endcomment %} {% for i in (lastLevel..currentLevel) offset:1 %} {% capture my_toc %}{{ my_toc }}
    {% endcapture %} {% assign nestedList = true %} {% endfor %} {% elsif currentLevel < lastLevel %} {% comment %} 需要关闭一个或多个子列表 {% endcomment %} {% for i in (currentLevel..lastLevel) offset:1 %} {% capture my_toc %}{{ my_toc }}
{% endcapture %} {% endfor %} {% elsif lastLevel > 0 and lastLevel == currentLevel %} {% comment %} 关闭上一个列表项 {% endcomment %} {% capture my_toc %}{{ my_toc }}{% endcapture %} {% endif %} {% comment %} 添加当前列表项 {% endcomment %} {% capture my_toc %}{{ my_toc }} {{ anchor_body }}{% endcapture %} {% assign lastLevel = currentLevel %} {% endif %} {% endfor %} {% comment %} 关闭所有打开的列表 {% endcomment %} {% if nestedList %} {% for i in (1..lastLevel) %} {% capture my_toc %}{{ my_toc }} {% endcapture %} {% endfor %} {% endif %} {% comment %} 将TOC包装在UL中 {% endcomment %} {% if my_toc != "" %} {% assign rootUlClass = include.class | default: '' %} {% capture my_toc %}{{ my_toc | strip }} {% endcapture %} {% endif %} {% endcapture %}{% assign tocWorkspace = '' %}
Index
{{ my_toc | strip }}
